description_long: This object is a stylized black flower with five broad, jagged-edged petals radiating from a central, faceted core. The petals are predominantly black with subtle pinkish-red highlights near their tips, giving the flower a dramatic and striking appearance. The flower is supported by a slender, dark green stem that bends slightly, adding a sense of organic irregularity. Two narrow, elongated leaves extend from the lower part of the stem, both rendered in a similar dark green hue. The overall form is angular and geometric, with a low-poly aesthetic that emphasizes sharp lines and flat surfaces. This flower would stand out in an urban park or garden due to its unusual coloration and bold, graphic style.
description: A stylized black flower with five jagged petals, pinkish-red highlights, and a slender green stem with two narrow leaves. Its bold, angular design gives it a dramatic, modern look.
description_view_0: The flower is seen at an angle, showing the jagged edges of the petals and the bent stem with two visible leaves.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view reveals the radial symmetry of the five petals and the central core, with all petals clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the angular, geometric petals and the pronounced bend in the stem, with the leaves partially visible.
description_view_3: A rear view highlights the back of the petals and the straight alignment of the stem, with one leaf more prominent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration around a central core, with each petal spaced evenly and no significant overlap. The arrangement is symmetrical, typical of many ornamental flowers.
